tagline: Building intelligent systems at the intersection of AI, software engineering, and product innovation.
description: Computer Science Engineering student at VIT Vellore, specializing in AI engineering, agentic systems, and full-stack development. Building real-world solutions from molecular AI to intelligent automation.

roles.detailed: Computer Science Student  •  AI Engineer  •  Product Builder

bio: Second-year Computer Science Engineering student at VIT Vellore (CGPA 8.9) with hands-on experience in AI/ML research, full-stack development, and intelligent automation. Currently building an AI Drug Discovery Platform at Curexa Labs and serving as a Teaching Assistant at SkoolOfCode. Passionate about agentic AI, graph neural networks, diffusion models, and scalable software architecture. Published AI/ML research and ranked 3rd among 200 participants at Code Vipassanna by Google.

bullets: Implementing molecular graph representation learning using PyTorch Geometric, improving predictive accuracy by 30% on ChEMBL and PubChem datasets.
Integrating diffusion-based generative models to synthesize candidate molecules, increasing novel compound discovery by 35%.
Developing automated data annotation pipelines using RDKit, reducing dataset preparation time by 40% while enabling scalable model training.
experience.desc: AI-driven drug discovery platform leveraging graph neural networks, diffusion models, and automated molecular pipelines for biomedical research.

bullets: Delivering Python programming instruction to students, reinforcing fundamentals through structured problem-solving and project-based learning.
Developing curriculum materials and guiding students through algorithmic thinking, data structures, and applied coding challenges.
Providing one-on-one mentorship to accelerate student progress and build confidence in software development.
experience.desc: Python programming instruction and curriculum development for students, combining pedagogy with applied software engineering fundamentals.

bullets: Developed and deployed full-stack web applications using the MERN stack, integrating AI-based chatbots and automation tools to enhance user experience by 60%.
Built modular backend services and optimized database queries, improving application performance and API response latency significantly.
Delivered production-ready features across React frontend and Node.js/Express backend with MongoDB data layer.
experience.desc: Full-stack MERN development with AI chatbot integration, backend optimization, and production deployment for web applications.

bullets: Developed a REST API using FastAPI and PostgreSQL to store and manage data from learning management systems.
Conducted deep research on Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning with focus on AI integration in technology and published a research paper.
Contributed to academic knowledge base through IEEE-formatted research on addressing modes for ISA design.
experience.desc: AI/ML research focused on practical applications, REST API development, and published academic contributions in computer architecture.

projects.title: AI Drug Discovery
projects.subtitle: Molecular Graph Learning Platform
projects.desc: Implemented molecular graph representation learning and diffusion-based generative models using PyTorch Geometric and biomedical datasets from ChEMBL and PubChem, improving predictive accuracy by 30% and novel compound discovery by 35%.

projects.title: OptimaX
projects.subtitle: AI Financial Analysis Workflows
projects.desc: Built intelligent financial analysis workflows using n8n and multimodal learning pipelines integrating textual signals, financial indicators, and time-series data. Achieved 3x faster quantitative decision generation and 60% reduction in manual overhead.

projects.title: Treads
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Fashion Platform
projects.desc: An AI-powered e-wardrobe platform combining virtual try-on experiences, intelligent outfit recommendations, and wardrobe management into a unified fashion-tech ecosystem. Currently in active development.

projects.title: Agentic OS
projects.subtitle: Autonomous Workflow Operating System
projects.desc: A next-generation operating system concept leveraging autonomous AI agents to orchestrate workflows, automate repetitive tasks, and coordinate intelligent decision-making across applications and services.

publications.title: AI Drug Discovery Platform
publications.desc: Molecular graph learning and diffusion-based generative models for automated drug candidate synthesis, achieving 35% improvement in novel compound discovery rates.

publications.title: Multimodal Deepfake Detection
publications.desc: Ranked 3rd among 200 participants at Code Vipassanna by Google. Published a blog detailing our multimodal deepfake detection system architecture and results.

publications.title: OptimaX Financial AI Workflows
publications.desc: Multimodal learning pipelines integrating textual, financial, and time-series signals for quantitative decision support — 28% improvement in strategy prediction accuracy.
